childhood.familyBackground: Mills family built medical device and healthcare equipment company. Father was renowned physician and inventor.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: Mills 가족은 의료 기기 및 의료 장비 회사를 구축했습니다. 아버지는 유명한 의사이자 발명가였습니다.
childhood.education: Harvard College (Biology); Harvard Medical School (MBA track)
childhood.educationKo: Harvard College(생물학); Harvard Medical School(MBA 트랙)
childhood.earlyLife: Grew up in Boston's medical and research community. Exposed to healthcare innovation from childhood.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 보스턴의 의료 및 연구 커뮤니티에서 성장함. 어린 시절부터 의료 혁신에 노출됨.

careerTimeline.event: Took leadership of Mills Medical Devices; expanded product innovation
careerTimeline.eventKo: Mills Medical Devices의 지도권 인수; 제품 혁신 확장

careerTimeline.event: Pioneered advanced medical imaging and diagnostic devices
careerTimeline.eventKo: 고급 의료 영상 및 진단 장치 개척

careerTimeline.event: Mills became major manufacturer of diagnostic and surgical medical devices
careerTimeline.eventKo: Mills는 진단 및 외과 의료 기기의 주요 제조업체가 됨

careerTimeline.event: Company valued at $3.8B with operations in 60+ countries; FDA-approved innovations
careerTimeline.eventKo: 회사는 60개 이상의 국가에서 운영하며 FDA 승인 혁신으로 €38억으로 평가됨

failures.description: Medical device approval delayed due to FDA regulatory changes; missed market windows
failures.descriptionKo: FDA 규제 변경으로 의료 기기 승인 지연; 시장 기회 상실
failures.lesson: Medical device companies must maintain regulatory expertise; FDA approval timing is critical
failures.lessonKo: 의료 기기 회사는 규제 전문성을 유지해야 하며, FDA 승인 타이밍이 중요

quotes.text: Medical innovation saves lives. Every device we develop is built with patients and healthcare providers in mind.
quotes.textKo: 의료 혁신은 생명을 구합니다. 우리가 개발하는 모든 기기는 환자와 의료 제공자를 고려하여 구축됩니다.
quotes.context: Speech at Medical Device Innovators Forum, 2020

recommended.title: The Medical Device R&D Handbook
recommended.author: Various Medical Engineers
recommended.note: Barnett references this for R&D best practices in medical devices
recommended.noteKo: Barnett는 의료 기기의 R&D 모범 사례를 위해 인용

personalTraits.knownFor: Medical device innovation, diagnostic imaging leadership, FDA approval expertise
personalTraits.knownForKo: 의료 기기 혁신, 진단 영상 리더십, FDA 승인 전문성
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports medical education and healthcare access programs in underserved communities
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 서비스가 부족한 지역의 의료 교육 및 의료 접근 프로그램 지원
